hero.subtitle: Online lessons with an Al-Azhar-trained Sheikh. Personalised, patient, and available worldwide.
hero.step2Sub: A short recitation or language check.
hero.step3Sub: Agree a plan that fits your week.
hero.pricingNote: Pricing depends on your goals and schedule.

trust.personalisedBody: Shaped around your level and pace.

home.quranDesc: Tajwid, tafsir, recitation, and memorisation with live correction.
home.arabicDesc: Arabic for non-native speakers — reading, grammar, and classical texts.
home.fiqhDesc: Hanafi fiqh, aqeedah, prophets, and the 40 Nawawi hadiths.
home.splitQuranTitle: Build a lasting relationship with the Quran
home.splitQuranBody: Tajwid correction, structured memorisation, and tafsir — all in one program. Available in English and Arabic, for men and children.
home.splitArabicBody: Core grammar, vocabulary, and guided reading practice with classical texts. Build real confidence with the language of the Quran.
home.splitArabicQuote: «The Arabic language is the finest of tongues, and learning it is part of the religion — for it is the instrument of knowledge and the key to understanding the faith.» — Al-Tha'alibi
home.splitFiqhTitle: Apply Islamic knowledge to daily life
home.splitFiqhBody: Hanafi fiqh, aqeedah, the stories of the prophets, and the 40 Nawawi hadiths. Group or individual sessions, taught in Arabic.
home.credibilityImageAlt: Classical Islamic books, notebook and pen on a wooden desk in warm natural light
home.azharBody: Formal training from one of the world's oldest and most respected institutions of Islamic scholarship.
home.testimonial1Quote: Daris helped me build a consistent, confident relationship with the Quran.
home.testimonial2Quote: Patient teaching that fits around my schedule. The progress has been steady and clear.
home.testimonial3Quote: Finally understanding fiqh in a way that connects to my daily life.
home.ctaText: Reach out and we'll guide you from there.

about.title: About Daris
about.description: Calm, structured teaching for students worldwide.
about.text1: Patient teaching grounded in clarity and gradual progress. Quran and tajwid available in English and Arabic. Fiqh and aqeedah taught in Arabic.
about.text2: Steady companionship in learning — reciting with care, revising consistently, applying knowledge to daily life. For men and children of all levels.
about.philosophyText: Knowledge connected with practice. A realistic pace that fits your week.
about.langText: Arabic for texts and recitation. English support available. Students welcome from any country.
about.ctaText: Reach out and we'll guide you from there.
